user.title: EasyIR
user.description: Pick your ZHA IR device (picker prefers TS1201 models). Built-in profiles ship with EasyIR; custom path is optional.%optional_supported

data.profile_path: Custom profile path (only if you chose Custom path)

start_learn.name: Start IR learn mode
start_learn.description: Enable hub learn mode and optionally auto-read one learned IR code.

ieee.name: IEEE
ieee.description: Optional if default IEEE is set in integration entry.

auto_read.name: Auto read
auto_read.description: If true, poll/read one learned code and stop learn automatically.

timeout_sec.name: Timeout seconds
timeout_sec.description: Max wait for one learned code in auto-read mode.

poll_interval_sec.name: Poll interval seconds
poll_interval_sec.description: Polling interval while waiting for learned code.

read_learned_code.name: Read learned IR code
read_learned_code.description: Read last learned code attribute and emit EasyIR learned-code event.
